description: Specialising in fashionable style, and crafted by skilled Indian craftsmen, murcia bags use the finest materials and hardware in their products. This stylishly silhouetted bag embodies the essence of the modern Indian woman - unapologetically fashionable. This bag with its textured leatherette upper and elegant bronzed hardware adds a stylish spin to your off-duty ensembles. Carry this while wearing dressed down outfits and a tonal belt. Textured leatherette upper with a metallic brand badge on the front and contrast stitch detailing Two handles with rivet detailing Two main zippered compartments with a zippered pocket on the second compartment Zippered pocket on the back A bronze buckle on the front for style Bag care Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust
